vulnerabilities.description: Missing security headers protection, no Helmet middleware implemented.
vulnerabilities.fix: Integrate Helmet middleware in your Express app to set various HTTP headers for security.

vulnerabilities.description: CORS settings not found, potential exposure to CSRF attacks.
vulnerabilities.fix: Configure CORS with a whitelist of allowed origins to protect against unauthorized cross-origin requests.

vulnerabilities.description: Rate limiting not implemented, increasing risk of DoS attacks.
vulnerabilities.fix: Integrate a rate-limiting middleware to limit the number of requests to the server per time unit.

vulnerabilities.description: No input sanitization or validation implemented in the current codebase.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement input validation and sanitization using libraries like express-validator or Joi to prevent injection attacks.

vulnerabilities.description: Potential for sensitive information leakage in logs, although not observed in the provided code.
vulnerabilities.fix: Ensure no sensitive information like JWT secrets or environment-specific secrets are logged by configuring the logging framework appropriately.
